nodes.description: UE is in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED state.
UE sends a REGISTRATION REQUEST message to the AMF.
UE has sent REGISTRATION REQUEST and is waiting for a response (Timer T3510 running).
AMF is idle with respect to this UE's registration procedure.
AMF receives the REGISTRATION REQUEST message from the UE.
AMF is processing the received REGISTRATION REQUEST, potentially initiating common procedures.
AMF sends a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message to the UE.
AMF has sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgement and is waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE (Timer T3550 running).
AMF considers the UE successfully registered.
UE receives the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message from the AMF.
UE has received REGISTRATION ACCEPT and considers itself registered (5GMM-REGISTERED state).
UE sends a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF.
AMF receives the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE.
AMF sends a REGISTRATION REJECT message to the UE.
UE receives the REGISTRATION REJECT message from the AMF.
UE enters a 5GMM-DEREGISTERED substate after receiving REGISTRATION REJECT.
Timer T3550 expires for the fifth time (final expiry).
UE starts timer T3510.
AMF is performing common procedures (e.g., authentication, security).
AMF initiates common procedures.
AMF starts timer T3550.
AMF determines REGISTRATION COMPLETE is not required.
UE is in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION state, typically waiting for T3511 or T3346 expiry before retry.
UE starts timer T3511.
Timer T3510 expires and registration attempt counter is less than 5.
Timer T3510 expires and registration attempt counter is equal to 5.
UE enters a final 5GMM-DEREGISTERED substate after maximum registration attempts.
Timer T3550 expires and retransmission counter is less than 4.

edges.description: Triggered when the UE in state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED initiates the initial registration procedure.
edges.conditions: UE needs to perform initial registration for 5GS services, emergency services, SMS over NAS, mobility from GERAN/UTRAN, SNPN onboarding, disaster roaming, or resuming normal services after unavailability.

edges.description: UE sends the REGISTRATION REQUEST message and enters the attempting registration state.
edges.conditions: UE initiates the procedure.

edges.description: Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION REQUEST message from the UE.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION REQUEST message received from UE.

edges.description: AMF starts processing the received REGISTRATION REQUEST message.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION REQUEST message received.

edges.description: Triggered when the UE receives the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message from the AMF.
edges.conditions: Network accepts the initial registration request (as indicated by receiving REGISTRATION ACCEPT).

edges.description: UE processes the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, resets registration attempt counter, enters 5GMM-REGISTERED state, and sets 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION ACCEPT message received.

edges.description: Triggered if the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message requires acknowledgement.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION ACCEPT contains specific IEs requiring acknowledgement (e.g., 5G-GUTI reallocation, SOR container, Operator-defined access category definitions, Extended emergency number list, CAG info, Negotiated PEIPS assistance info, UE radio capability ID info, Truncated 5G-S-TMSI config, service-level-AA pending indication, NSSAI updates, On-demand NSSAI, NSSRG info, S-NSSAI time/location validity info, Alternative NSSAI, Network slicing subscription change indication, NSAG info).

edges.description: Triggered when the AMF, waiting with T3550 running, receives the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION COMPLETE message received from UE while AMF is in state AMF_5GMM_COMMON_PROCEDURE_INITIATED.

edges.description: AMF processes the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message, stops timer T3550, and enters the 5GMM-REGISTERED state.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION COMPLETE message received and processed successfully.

edges.description: AMF sends the REGISTRATION REJECT message and concludes the procedure for this UE, returning to idle.
edges.conditions: Initial registration request cannot be accepted by the network.

edges.description: Triggered when the UE receives the REGISTRATION REJECT message from the AMF.
edges.conditions: Network rejects the initial registration request (as indicated by receiving REGISTRATION REJECT).

edges.description: UE processes the REGISTRATION REJECT message and enters an appropriate 5GMM-DEREGISTERED substate based on the 5GMM cause value.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION REJECT message received and processed according to the specific 5GMM cause value (e.g., #3, #6, #7, #11, #12, #13, #15, #22, #27, #31, #62, #72, #73, #74, #75, #76, #77, #78, #79, #80, #81, #82).

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3550 expires for the fifth time (final expiry) without receiving REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
edges.conditions: Timer T3550 expires 5 times (initial start + 4 retransmissions).

edges.description: AMF aborts waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE and enters the 5GMM-REGISTERED state after the final T3550 timeout.
edges.conditions: Fifth expiry of timer T3550 occurs.

edges.description: UE starts timer T3510 immediately after sending the REGISTRATION REQUEST message.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION REQUEST message sent.

edges.description: Triggered if the AMF decides to initiate common procedures (e.g., identification, authentication, security).
edges.conditions: AMF determines common procedures are needed based on information in REGISTRATION REQUEST (e.g., no valid security context).

edges.description: AMF enters the state of performing the initiated common procedures.
edges.conditions: Common procedures initiated by AMF.

edges.description: AMF sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT after successfully completing necessary common procedures and deciding to accept the registration.
edges.conditions: Common procedures (if initiated) completed successfully, and registration request is accepted by the network.

edges.description: AMF sends REGISTRATION REJECT if common procedures fail or if the registration is rejected for other reasons discovered during processing.
edges.conditions: Common procedures fail (e.g., authentication failure) or registration is rejected based on checks performed (e.g., subscription, restrictions).

edges.description: AMF enters this state after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT if acknowledgement (REGISTRATION COMPLETE) is required.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION ACCEPT contains specific IEs requiring acknowledgement (e.g., 5G-GUTI, SOR container, Operator-defined access category definitions, Extended emergency number list, CAG info, Negotiated PEIPS assistance info, UE radio capability ID info, Truncated 5G-S-TMSI config, service-level-AA pending indication, NSSAI updates, On-demand NSSAI, NSSRG info, S-NSSAI time/location validity info, Alternative NSSAI, Network slicing subscription change indication, NSAG info).

edges.description: AMF starts timer T3550 because the sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT requires acknowledgement.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION ACCEPT contains specific IEs requiring acknowledgement (same conditions as for entering AMF_5GMM_COMMON_PROCEDURE_INITIATED state).

edges.description: Occurs if the sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT does not contain any IEs that require acknowledgement via REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION ACCEPT does not contain any IEs listed in 5.5.1.2.4 that trigger starting T3550.

edges.description: AMF transitions directly to the registered state as no REGISTRATION COMPLETE is expected from the UE.
edges.conditions: REGISTRATION COMPLETE is not required/expected based on the content of REGISTRATION ACCEPT.

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3510 expires and the registration attempt counter is less than 5.
edges.conditions: Timer T3510 expires; Registration attempt counter < 5.

edges.description: UE enters the 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION state after T3510 timeout (when counter < 5).
edges.conditions: T3510 timeout occurred; Registration attempt counter < 5.

edges.description: UE starts timer T3511 to wait before retrying registration.
edges.conditions: T3510 timeout occurred; Registration attempt counter < 5.

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3510 expires and the registration attempt counter reaches 5.
edges.conditions: Timer T3510 expires; Registration attempt counter = 5.

edges.description: UE enters a final deregistered state (5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION or optionally 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.PLMN-SEARCH) after T3510 timeout and reaching the maximum registration attempts.
edges.conditions: T3510 timeout occurred; Registration attempt counter = 5.

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3550 expires, and the retransmission counter is less than 4 (i.e., it's one of the first four expiries).
edges.conditions: Timer T3550 expires; Retransmission count < 4.

edges.description: AMF retransmits REGISTRATION ACCEPT, resets and restarts T3550, and returns to waiting state.
edges.conditions: T3550 timeout occurred; Retransmission count < 4.
